sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n115517" key="yeudologiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ψευδολογ-ικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n115517.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">lying, false, Proll.Hermog.</tr_> in <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Prolegomenon Sylloge</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0093.tlg009:p.282" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.282</biblScope> </bibl> Rabe.</sense> </entryFree>
